name: Vesper Kaida
bio: Builds neon-lit street-style avatars with a focus on modular armor pieces and animated visor UI.

extraBio.title: Commission info
extraBio.text: Full avatar commissions take 3-5 weeks. Rigging-only or texture-only passes available separately.

name: Rin Solace
bio: Specializes in expressive custom face rigs for creature and hybrid-form avatars.

name: Onyx Marrow
bio: Dark academia-inspired designs with hand-sculpted fabric physics and candlelit textures.

name: Fable Ashgrove
bio: Painterly hand-drawn textures for woodland and botanical-themed avatars.

name: Juno Vellichor
bio: Hard-surface mecha shells with functioning panel lights and thruster VFX.

name: Wren Isolde
bio: Soft-shaded kemono avatars with custom tail and ear physics setups.

name: Halcyon Vane
bio: Builds companion props and interactive gadgets that pair with any avatar base.

name: Marlow Petra
bio: Baroque-inspired horned and winged forms with intricate metal filigree.
